response.overview: The movie is a short film created by me, the person reading it. My name is Brandon Berlant. The movie I plan to make a 20 minute horror short film. It follows newly turned adult Justin Williams. For the last 5 years Justin has dealt with extreme trauma of his past. He witnessed his parent's & his brother being murdered in front of him. He then went undercover with Junior police officer, Hank Williams. They searched but were never able to find the killer. Years later, reports of murders and paranormal sightings have occurred leading Justin & Hank to return to Justin’s home on Margate Street.
response.tagline: What mysteries will occur on this return…?
response.title: The Return To Margate Street
